Start Your Ascent at Galata

In a campus where learning knows no boundaries, knowledge transforms and the individual is reshaped. 
By placing the core dynamics of life at its center, Istanbul Galata University brings education to the very heart of life with its 4S 1T (Health, Art, Social, Sports, Technology) approach.

A campus without borders will offer you a brand-new perspective.
